requirement_topic.en: OCPP, Remote Operation, EMC and Power Quality

summary.en: No public Gambia national OCPP mandate for EV chargers could be confirmed. For networked public, fleet, donor, or site-owner chargers, OCPP support is the practical interoperability baseline for back-office monitoring, billing, fault reporting, access control, and load management. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-series standards because charger rectifiers can inject harmonics, flicker, and conducted/radiated emissions into a constrained grid.
summary.zh: 未能确认冈比亚存在公共国家级OCPP强制要求。对于联网公共、车队、捐助方或场地方充电桩，OCPP支持是后台监控、计费、故障报告、访问控制和负载管理的实际互操作基线。由于充电桩整流器可能向受限电网注入谐波、闪变及传导/辐射发射，应按IEC 61000系列准备EMC和电能质量证据。
summary.zht: 未能確認甘比亞存在公共國家級OCPP強制要求。對於聯網公共、車隊、捐助方或場地方充電樁，OCPP支持是後台監控、計費、故障報告、訪問控制和負載管理的實際互操作基線。由於充電樁整流器可能向受限電網注入諧波、閃變及傳導/輻射發射，應按IEC 61000系列準備EMC和電能質量證據。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonics, flicker, immunity and emissions
PURA / NAWEC project requirements for networked public chargers — confirm case by case
IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where CCS2 DC communication is required

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle BMS. That CAN protocol is not a CCS2 vehicle-communication stack and is not the same as OCPP back-office communication. China AC and DC chargers may also use operator-specific cloud protocols that need independent compatibility testing before deployment in Gambia.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常采用GB/T 27930-2023进行非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间的通信。该CAN协议不是CCS2车辆通信栈，也不同于OCPP后台通信。中国交流和直流充电桩还可能采用运营商私有云协议，在冈比亚部署前需要独立兼容性测试。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常採用GB/T 27930-2023進行非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間的通訊。該CAN協議不是CCS2車輛通訊棧，也不同於OCPP後台通訊。中國交流和直流充電樁還可能採用運營商私有雲協議，在甘比亞部署前需要獨立兼容性測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: For any managed charger, confirm OCPP version, SIM or Ethernet connectivity, cyber-security requirements, local data-hosting expectations, outage behaviour, offline authorization, load management, metering accuracy, and remote diagnostics. Separately provide IEC 61000 EMC, harmonic-current, flicker, surge, EFT, ESD, and immunity reports. On weak feeders, unmanaged fast charging can worsen voltage drops and power quality.
gap.zh: 对于任何受管理的充电桩，应确认OCPP版本、SIM或以太网连接、网络安全要求、本地数据托管预期、断网行为、离线授权、负载管理、计量准确度和远程诊断。同时应单独提供IEC 61000 EMC、谐波电流、闪变、浪涌、电快速瞬变、静电放电和抗扰度报告。在薄弱馈线上，未受控快充可能加剧电压跌落和电能质量问题。
gap.zht: 對於任何受管理的充電樁，應確認OCPP版本、SIM或以太網連接、網絡安全要求、本地數據託管預期、斷網行為、離線授權、負載管理、計量準確度和遠程診斷。同時應單獨提供IEC 61000 EMC、諧波電流、閃變、浪湧、電快速瞬變、靜電放電和抗擾度報告。在薄弱饋線上，未受控快充可能加劇電壓跌落和電能質量問題。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP is project-required for managed chargers when specified by the operator, donor, fleet, PURA/NAWEC condition, or tender; IEC 61000 evidence is a practical grid and EMC acceptance expectation
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle communication and is not an OCPP or CCS2 interoperability substitute

source.publisher: PURA — The Gambia Public Utilities Regulatory Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP and IEC 61000 evidence should be treated as project-enabling documentation for managed Gambia chargers. GB/T 27930 DC communication does not solve back-office integration, CCS2 communication, or power-quality acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP和IEC 61000证据应被视为冈比亚受管理充电桩项目落地文件。GB/T 27930直流通信不能解决后台集成、CCS2通信或电能质量验收问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP和IEC 61000證據應被視為甘比亞受管理充電樁項目落地文件。GB/T 27930直流通訊不能解決後台集成、CCS2通訊或電能質量驗收問題。
